name: clo-author
description: Codex-native research architecture for empirical social science, with default-installed workflow skills, critic gates, and explicit runtime activation checks.

author.name: Hugo Sant'Anna and Codex port contributors

interface.shortDescription: Empirical social-science research workflows for Codex
interface.longDescription: Bring the canonical Clo-Author research workflow into Codex through repo-local skills that install by default, file-backed memory, explicit worker-critic gates, and a required runtime activation smoke test.
interface.developerName: Hugo Sant'Anna and Codex port contributors
defaultPrompt: Set up this repository for a new empirical research project
Run a literature review and data search for my research question
Peer review this paper as if it were headed to a target journal
